summary: Executed ChatGPT remote image service with prompt '生成一张小猫睡觉的照片'. Both attempts (task IDs: 675d0564-9c52-4f81-8697-faeb66096ee7, 3d78accf-3036-4d6b-b066-645dcd3d1a7f) reached the downloadImage stage but failed consistently because the locator `[role="dialog"]` was not visible within the 10-second timeout. The image generation itself succeeded (generatedVisibleMs ~37-43s) — the failure is in the download/automation step, suggesting the ChatGPT save-image dialog UI has changed or the dialog selector is stale.

resolved_values.prompt: 生成一张小猫睡觉的照片
